title: A Look At AXT (AXTI) Valuation After Q1 Beat And AI Data Center Expansion Plans
description:
AXT (AXTI) stock jumped after Q1 results showed better than expected revenue, a sharp reduction in net and operating losses, and new capital to expand indium phosphide capacity for artificial intelligence data center demand.
See our latest analysis for AXT.
The stock has been on an aggressive run, with a 1 day share price return of 16.37%, a 30 day share price return of 84.91% and a year to date share price return of 740.27%. The 1 year total shareholder return is also very large, reflecting...

title: Is It Too Late To Consider AXT (AXTI) After Its 7x Year To Date Surge?
description:
If you are wondering whether AXT’s recent share price moves still leave room for value, or if you may be arriving late to the story, this article focuses squarely on what the current price might be offering you.
AXT closed at US$140.83, with returns of 13.8% over the past week, 84.9% over the past month, roughly 7x year to date, and a very large gain over the past year and multi year periods. These moves raise questions about how the market is now viewing its prospects and risks.
